narrative:
Precinct Wellington Vill East (precinct in Lorain County) has 977 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
